debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
V : ℝ
hV : V > FKS.Inputs.T₀ I
⊢ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 V) fun ρ => 1 / ρ.im) <
    FKS.Inputs.S₀ I + FKS.Inputs.B₁ I (FKS.Inputs.T₀ I) V

failed_attempts:
have hT₀ : 1 ≤ I.T₀ := by sorry
  have h_split : Set.Ioo 0 V = Set.Ioo 0 I.T₀ ∪ Set.Ico I.T₀ V := by
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_Ico]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨h0, hV⟩
      by_cases h : x < I.T₀
      · left; exact ⟨h0, h⟩
      · right; exact ⟨le_of_not_lt h, hV⟩
    · rintro (⟨h0, hT⟩ | ⟨hT, hV⟩)
      · exact ⟨h0, lt_trans hT hV⟩
      · exact ⟨lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (le_trans hT₀ hT), hV⟩
  rw [h_split, riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_union]
  · apply add_lt_add_of_lt_of_le I.hS₀T₀
    exact lemma_2_1 I hT₀ (le_of_lt hV)
  · rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_Ico, Set.mem_empty_iff_false, not_and]
    intro _ hT _ _
    linarith

rw [riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_split I.T₀ (le_of_lt hV)]
  exact add_lt_of_lt_of_le I.hS₀T₀ (lemma_2_1 I (by linarith) (le_of_lt hV))

have hT₀ : 1 ≤ I.T₀ := by linarith
  rw [← Set.Ioo_union_Ico_eq_Ioo (le_of_lt hV) (by linarith)]
  rw [riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_union Set.disjoint_Ioo_Ico]
  apply add_lt_add_of_lt_of_le I.hS₀T₀
  exact lemma_2_1 I hT₀ (le_of_lt hV)

have hT₀ : 1 ≤ I.T₀ := by sorry
  have h_split : Set.Ioo 0 V = Set.Ioo 0 I.T₀ ∪ Set.Ico I.T₀ V := by

    · rintro (⟨h0, hT⟩ | ⟨hT, hV'⟩)

      · exact ⟨lt_of_le_of_lt (by linarith) hT, hV'⟩
  rw [h_split, riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_union]
  · apply add_lt_add_of_lt_of_le I.hS₀T₀

  · rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]

    intro
